deviceDocumentation.summary: Analog quantum processor based on neutral atom arrays
Universal gate-model QPU based on trapped ions

deviceParameters.title: IonqDeviceParameters
deviceParameters.description: This defines the parameters common to all the IonQ devices.

GateModelParameters.title: GateModelParameters
GateModelParameters.description: Defines parameters common to all gate model devices.

deviceParameters.title: GateModelSimulatorDeviceParameters
deviceParameters.description:
This defines the parameters common to all the gatemodel devices.

Attributes:
    paradigmParameters: Parameters that are common to gatemodel paradigm

Examples:
    >>> import json
    >>> input_json = {
    ...    "braketSchemaHeader": {
    ...        "name": "braket.device_schema.simulators.gate_model_simulator_device_parameters",
    ...        "version": "1",
    ...    },
    ...    "paradigmParameters": {"braketSchemaHeader": {
    ...        "name": "braket.device_schema.gate_model_parameters",
    ...        "version": "1",
    ...    },"qubitCount": 1},
    ... }
    >>> GateModelSimulatorDeviceParameters.parse_raw_schema(json.dumps(input_json))

GateModelParameters.title: GateModelParameters
GateModelParameters.description:
This defines the parameters common to all the gatemodel devices.

Attributes:
    qubitCount: number of qubits for a device

Examples:
    >>> import json
    >>> input_json = {
    ...    "braketSchemaHeader": {
    ...        "name": "braket.device_schema.gate_model_parameters",
    ...        "version": "1",
    ...    },
    ...    "qubitCount": 1
    ... }
    >>> GateModelParameters.parse_raw_schema(json.dumps(input_json))

deviceDocumentation.summary: Gaussian Boson Sampling on a programmable photonic processor

paradigm.layout:
name template_borealis
version 1.0
target borealis (shots=1)
type tdm (temporal_modes=331, copies=1)

float array p0[1, 331] =
    {s}
float array p1[1, 331] =
    {r0}
float array p2[1, 331] =
    {bs0}
float array p3[1, 331] =
    {loop0_phase}
float array p4[1, 331] =
    {r1}
float array p5[1, 331] =
    {bs1}
float array p6[1, 331] =
    {loop1_phase}
float array p7[1, 331] =
    {r2}
float array p8[1, 331] =
    {bs2}
float array p9[1, 331] =
    {loop2_phase}

Sgate({s}, 0.0) | 43
Rgate({r0}) | 43
BSgate({bs0}, 1.5707963267948966) | [42, 43]
Rgate({loop0_phase}) | 43
Rgate({r1}) | 42
BSgate({bs1}, 1.5707963267948966) | [36, 42]
Rgate({loop1_phase}) | 42
Rgate({r2}) | 36
BSgate({bs2}, 1.5707963267948966) | [0, 36]
Rgate({loop2_phase}) | 36
MeasureFock() | 0

fidelityType.name: RANDOMIZED_BENCHMARKING
fidelityType.description: Average readout fidelity is estimated with one-qubit randomized benchmarking.

fidelityType.name: RANDOMIZED_BENCHMARKING
fidelityType.description: Average gate fidelities for a maximally entangling two-qubit native gate. It is regularly measured by IonQ on the device using Direct Randomized Benchmarking
